subject: (no subject)
body:
So there is no mix up on my part , ( like the last time ).    you are both  addresed on this email  and I suggest you coordinate directly,    Ariane,   Ehud will meet for breakfast in Geneve on tues 18 morning at the location and time of your choice.

--
